problem.title: Power of Two
problem.description: Given an integer n, return true if it is a power of two. Otherwise, return false. An integer n is a power of two, if there exists an integer x such that n == 2^x.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Bit Manipulation
solutions.description: A power of two has exactly one bit set in its binary representation. The expression n & (n-1) clears the lowest set bit; if the result is 0 (and n is positive), only one bit was set, confirming n is a power of two.
